title: ReAlpha
description: A Fabric recreation of Minecraft Alpha v1.0.4 for Minecraft 1.21.1
body:
# ReAlpha
A modern Fabric recreation of **Minecraft Alpha v1.0.4**, rebuilt for **Minecraft 1.21**.

Rather than a simple downgrade or snapshot clone, this modpack is a **near 1:1 remaster** using modern Fabric mods, configs, and resource packs to accurately reproduce the *feel*, *mechanics*, and *atmosphere* of Alpha Minecraft while benefiting from modern blocks & items, performance and stability. The experience is intentionally kept as close to the original as possible

---

### Included Mods

* Alpha Recipes
* Architectury
* Entity Model Features
* Entity Texture Features
* Fabric API
* ImmediatelyFast
* Konkrete
* LibJF
* Lithium
* Melancholic Hunger & HUD
* Melody
* Mod Menu
* Modern Beta
* No Bat
* No Beds Item
* No Blaze
* No Cat
* No Cave Spider
* No Drowned
* No Enderman
* No Evoker
* No Glow Squid
* No Guardian
* No Hoglin
* No Horse
* No Husk
* No Iron Golem
* No More Amethyst Geodes
* No More Chorus Plant
* No More Copper Ore
* No More Deepslate
* No More Glow Lichen
* No More Grass and Kelp
* No More Igloos
* No More Jungle Temples
* No More Nether Gold Ore
* No More Ocean Monuments
* No More Ocean Ruins
* No More Pillager Outposts
* No More Post Beta Flowers
* No More Ruined Portals
* No More Shipwrecks
* No More Stone Variants
* No More Swamp Huts
* No More Trail Ruins
* No More Underwater Magma
* No More Villages
* No More Wandering Merchant
* No More Woodland Mansions
* No Ocelot
* No Phantom
* No Piglin
* No Piglin Brute
* No Pillager
* No Silverfish
* No Skeleton Horse
* No Snow Golem
* No Squid
* No Stray
* No Witch
* No Wither Skeleton
* No XP
* No Zombie Horse
* No Zombified Piglin
* Nostalgic Tweaks
* Placeholder API
* Sodium
* Sodium Extra
* VersionChanger
* YetAnotherConfigLib

---

### Resource Packs

* **Golden Days – Base**
* **Golden Days – Alpha**
* **Golden Days – Music**

---

### Notes

* World generation, terrain, and biome behavior are handled by **Moderner Beta** and **VersionChanger** to closely match Alpha v1.0.4
* Modern mobs, structures, blocks, and mechanics are aggressively removed to preserve authenticity
* Performance mods are included but intentionally invisible to gameplay
* This pack prioritizes *accuracy and atmosphere* and modern convenience
* Netherite

---

This modpack is for players who want Minecraft as it once was:
**quiet, empty, rough, and timeless.**
